title: HyperFurnace
description:
This is a mod that allows you to adjust the smelting speed of the furnace.  
You can choose the speed from 1x (default), 10x, 20x, 30x, 40x, 50x.
body:
![gif](https://github.com/ChihaluCoding/Minecraft-Mod-Download-Site/blob/main/assets/images/hyperfurnace.gif?raw=true)

# HyperFurnace

that adds speed selection functionality to the existing furnace UI, allowing players to choose from six processing speeds: 1x (default),10x, 20x, 30x, 40x, 50x.

This mod aims to make Minecraft gameplay more efficient and flexible, particularly for players who need to smelt large quantities of items.
